reviews.comment:
Muy lindo lugar para parar unos minutos y un lindo parque donde descansar con los perros y comer o tomar algo antes de seguir viaje

(Translated by Google)
A very nice place to stop for a few minutes and a lovely park where you can relax with the dogs and have something to eat or drink before continuing your journey
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14840228736131746142/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2tSbVJqSkRVbFpYYUhwRGExODRaa0l0ZDI5SldFRRAB

reviews.comment:
Excelente atención, los chicos una maravilla da gusto parar. La verdad es que te llena de buena energía para seguir el viaje. Da gusto y no dejen de probar los alfajores Aljibe espectaculares, tienen los Maradona que se ven pocos también y unos zafarrancho que son como los havana. Un placer, sigan así chicos y gracias.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service, the staff are wonderful, it's a pleasure to stop. It truly fills you with positive energy for the rest of your trip. It's a real treat, and be sure to try the Aljibe alfajores—they're spectacular! They also have the Maradona variety, which is hard to find, and some Zafarrancho alfajores that are like Havana brand. A pleasure, keep up the good work, guys, and thank you!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14840228736131746142/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT25CcFRFRmpiRmxLWDE5RFUxQk9iblJWVFZOWmJIYxAB

reviews.comment:
Muy buena atencion de los chicos del full
Encima tienen la opcion de hacerte socio a bajo precio y tenes el servicio del A.C.A al instante....los felicito sigan asi.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service from the guys at Full. Plus, they offer the option to become a member at a low price and get instant access to A.C.A. services... congratulations, keep it up!
